title: The Final Commitment
theme: one jump, everything you know, no second chance
learningGoal: execute a fully-read plan under pressure without a practice attempt
mentalModel: mastery is committing to the correct single jump the first time it is offered
misconceptions: the hardest level must hide its solution
a creator-bait level is unfair by design
subversion: the level shows you the whole solution and dares you to distrust it
optimizationFocus: the frame-perfect commit a confident expert lands on the first read
finalExam: clear the campaign hardest single-jump gauntlet on a fully legible but unforgiving route

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive planning read because the laser reshapes the approach and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
